an1.219-234:1.1:
1
(219) "Bhikkhus, the foremost of my bhikkhu disciples among those who are learned is Ānanda."
an1.219-234:1.2: (220) " … among those with good memory is Ānanda."
an1.219-234:1.3: (221) " … among those with a quick grasp is Ānanda."
an1.219-234:1.4: (222) " … among those who are resolute is Ānanda."
an1.219-234:1.6: (224) " … among those with a large retinue is Uruvelakassapa."
an1.219-234:1.7: (225) " … among those who inspire confidence in families is Kāludāyi."
an1.219-234:1.8: (226) " … among those with good health is Bakkula."
an1.219-234:1.9: (227) " … among those who recollect past lives is Sobhita."
an1.219-234:1.10: (228) " … among the upholders of the discipline is Upāli."
an1.219-234:1.11: (229) " … among those who exhort bhikkhunīs is Nandaka."
an1.219-234:1.12: (230) " … among those who guard the doors of the sense faculties is Nanda."
an1.219-234:1.13: (231) " … among those who exhort bhikkhus is Mahākappina."
an1.219-234:1.14: (232) " … among those with skill with the fire element is Sāgata."
an1.219-234:1.15: (233) " … among those who receive eloquent discourses is Rādha."
an1.219-234:1.16: (234) " … among those who wear coarse robes is Mogharājā."
